{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/candy_cane_block.png
|block_health=8
|tool=[[Axe]]
|rotation=log
}}

== Obtaining ==
Candy cane blocks are only found in the Tuften Fields and Winter Wonderland rare biomes.

== Usage ==
Candy Cane blocks can be crafted into 2 [[Candy Cane|candy canes]].

== History ==

* [[0.1.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
